commands.purpose: Enumerate sessions. Prints id, tenant, name, session_type, starts_at (from booking), status, head_coach, checked_in_count.
Print full session resolution trace: row + resource_booking window + attached coaches + attendance list + ratings summary + last 10 audit rows.

commands.signature: session:create {tenant : ULID or slug} {branch : ULID or slug} {resource_booking : ULID} {name} {--type=practice} {--team=} {--season=} {--event=} {--sport=} {--head-coach=} {--capacity=} {--min-attendance=} {--curriculum=}
commands.purpose: CLI create. Consumes 1 session_slot per ISO calendar week. Same-tenant/branch invariants enforced.

commands.signature: session:cancel {session : ULID or slug} {reason : cancellation reason (REQUIRED)} {--force-short-notice}
commands.purpose: Cancel a session. Fires SessionCancelled. --force-short-notice bypasses the <24h permission check (for ops incidents).

commands.signature: session:check-in {session : ULID or slug} {athlete : ULID or slug} {--at=}
commands.purpose: Check an athlete into a session. --at overrides the check-in timestamp (default now()).

commands.signature: session:mark-absent {session : ULID or slug} {athlete : ULID or slug}
session:mark-late {session : ULID or slug} {athlete : ULID or slug} {--minutes=}
commands.purpose: Mark athlete late with the late_minutes computed or explicit.

commands.signature: session:remove-athlete {session : ULID or slug} {athlete : ULID or slug} {--reason=}
commands.purpose: Soft-delete an attendance row. Fires SessionAthleteRemoved.
Assign / reassign coaches. Fires SessionCoachAssigned or SessionCoachReassigned per change.
